zh.lifeSummary: 當Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan於1112年出生在威爾士布雷康史爾格林塔維時，他的父親Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis17歲，母親Gwenllian verch Philip18歲。他於大約1125年與Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire在威爾士結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1165年之後，埋葬在威爾士布雷康史爾格林塔維。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan于1112年出生在威尔士布雷康史爾格林塔維时，他的父亲Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis17岁，母亲Gwenllian verch Philip18岁。他于大约1125年与Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire在威尔士结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1165年之后，埋葬在威尔士布雷康史爾格林塔維。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

nameMeanings.name: Gwrgan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Meath): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Geargáin ‘descendant of Geargán’ or shortened from Mac Geargáin ‘son of Geargán’, a personal name from a diminutive of garg ‘fierce’.

en.lifeSummary: When Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan was born in 1112, in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales, his father, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, was 17 and his mother, Gwenllian verch Philip, was 18. He married Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire about 1125, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters. He died after 1165, and was buried in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales.

fr.Brigan, Glamorganshire, Wales: Brigan, Glamorgan, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan est né en 1112, à Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, son père, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Gwenllian verch Philip, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire environ 1125, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé après 1165, et a été enterré à Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan 1112 in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis 17 und seine Mutter Gwenllian verch Philip 18. Er hat um 1125 in Wales Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb nach 1165 und wurde in Glyntawe, Breconshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan è nato il nel 1112 nel Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles, il suo padre, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Gwenllian verch Philip, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire circa 1125, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie. Morì dopo il 1165, e fu sepolto a Glyntawe, Breconshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrganが1112年にウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウで生まれた時，父Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wisは17歳，母Gwenllian verch Philipは18歳であった。約1125年にウェールズでMallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1165年以後に死去し，ウェールズブレコンシュアイアグリンタウにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan(이)가 1112년 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타베에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Gwenllian verch Philip(은)는 18세였다. 그는 대략 1125년 웨일스에서 Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1165년 이후 사망했으며 웨일스 브레콘실르 그린타베에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan nasceu em 1112, em Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, seu pai, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Gwenllian verch Philip, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire aproximadamente 1125, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu após 1165, e foi sepultado em Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales.

ro.Brigan, Glamorganshire, Wales: Brigan, Glamorgan, Țara Galilor, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan родился в 1112 г. в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwenllian verch Philip, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire около 1125 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер после 1165 г. и был похоронен в местности глинтав, брекуншир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cydifor Cadivor Ap Gwrgan nació en 1112, en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales, su papá, Gwgon ap Bleddyn, Arglwydd of Cas wis, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Gwenllian verch Philip, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Mallt verch LLywelyn Fychan of Carmarthenshire aproximadamente 1125, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió después de 1165, y fue sepultado en Glyntawe, Breconshire, Gales.
